title: Finite Equivalence Classes And Quotients

solver_reuse.pressure: Quotient-map congruence conflict where a = c but the malformed row demands q(a) != q(c).
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional quotient or partition rows only when they add distinct equality/congruence solver pressure; keep infinite quotient-set and general equivalence-relation theorems in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Replay finite equivalence relations and partitions from raw tables.
Check that quotient-map fibers exactly match equivalence classes.
Emit checked counterexample evidence for false equivalence-relation claims.
Keep the QF_UF quotient-map congruence artifact tied to a zero-trust Alethe proof regression before claiming proof-object coverage.
